faqs.question: How long does shipping take?
faqs.answer: Standard shipping takes 3-5 business days within the continental US. Express shipping (1-2 business days) is available at checkout. International orders typically arrive within 7-14 business days.

faqs.question: Do you offer free shipping?
faqs.answer: Yes! We offer free standard shipping on orders over $50. Orders under $50 have a flat $5.99 shipping fee.

faqs.question: Can I track my order?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Once your order ships, you'll receive a tracking number via email. You can also track your order in the My Orders section of your account.

faqs.question: Do you ship internationally?
faqs.answer: Yes, we ship to over 50 countries worldwide. Shipping costs and delivery times vary by destination and are calculated at checkout.

faqs.question: What is your return policy?
faqs.answer: We accept returns within 30 days of delivery for items in original condition and packaging. Opened or used electronics may be subject to a 15% restocking fee.

faqs.question: How do I return a product?
faqs.answer: Log into your account, go to My Orders, select the order, and click Return Item. Print the prepaid return label and drop off at any carrier location.

faqs.question: When will I receive my refund?
faqs.answer: Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days after we receive your return. The refund will be issued to your original payment method.

faqs.question: Are your smart devices compatible with Alexa and Google Assistant?
faqs.answer: Most of our smart home products including the Smart Speaker and Security Camera are compatible with both Amazon Alexa and Google Assistant. Check the individual product page for compatibility details.

faqs.question: Is the Smart Pen compatible with all iPad models?
faqs.answer: The Smart Pen for iPad is compatible with iPad Pro, iPad Air, and iPad mini models released after 2018. It is not compatible with older iPad models. Check the product page for the full compatibility list.

faqs.question: Are the smartwatches compatible with both Android and iPhone?
faqs.answer: Our smartwatches are compatible with both Android (8.0+) and iOS (12+). Full functionality including health tracking and notifications is supported on both platforms.

faqs.question: What is the water resistance rating on the Smart Watch Black?
faqs.answer: The Smart Watch Black has a water resistance rating of 5ATM (50 meters). It is safe for swimming and rain but not suitable for scuba diving or high-pressure water sports.

faqs.question: Does the Security Camera require a subscription for cloud storage?
faqs.answer: Basic motion alerts and live viewing are free. Cloud storage for recorded footage requires a subscription starting at $3.99/month. Local storage via SD card (sold separately) is also supported.

faqs.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.answer: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex, Discover), PayPal, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and Shop Pay.

faqs.question: Can I modify or cancel my order?
faqs.answer: Orders can be modified or cancelled within 1 hour of placement. Contact customer service immediately at support@gocart.com or use the live chat on our website.

faqs.question: Do you offer gift wrapping?
faqs.answer: Yes! Select the gift wrap option at checkout for $5. We'll include a personalized message card and secure protective packaging.

faqs.question: What warranty do your products come with?
faqs.answer: All GoCart electronics come with a minimum 1-year manufacturer warranty covering defects in materials and workmanship. Some products like the Home Theater system include a 2-year warranty.

faqs.question: How do I claim a warranty?
faqs.answer: Contact our support team at support@gocart.com with your order number and a description of the issue. We'll guide you through the warranty claim process and arrange a replacement or repair.

faqs.question: My product arrived damaged. What should I do?
faqs.answer: If your product arrived damaged, contact us within 48 hours of delivery with photos of the damage and your order number. We'll send a replacement at no charge or issue a full refund.

faqs.question: How does your rewards program work?
faqs.answer: Earn 1 point per dollar spent. 100 points = $5 reward. Members get early access to sales, exclusive deals, and priority customer support. Sign up free on our website.

faqs.question: I forgot my password. How do I reset it?
faqs.answer: Click Forgot Password on the login page, enter your email, and we'll send reset instructions. Check your spam folder if you don't see it within 5 minutes.
